requirement.description: When the front-left door changes from closed to open, the system shall immediately make the updated door status available to the display controller.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFL transitions from Closed (0) to Open (1) when the door is opened.
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_gw_s01_001_doorfl_open_transition(can_bus):
    msgs = collect_messages(can_bus, MSG_ID_BODY_STATUS, CAPTURE_TIME)
    assert msgs
    assert decode_door_fl(msgs[-1]) == 1

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFL remains Open while the door stays open.
Verify DoorFL is transmitted periodically after opening.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorFL = 1 present in all periodic transmissions

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFL update latency is immediate.
test_cases.expected_result: First frame after event shows DoorFL = 1 without delay

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFL behavior is deterministic across repeated open/close cycles.
test_cases.expected_result: Each open event consistently produces DoorFL = 1

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFL is correctly transmitted after an ignition cycle.
Verify DoorFL update is independent of other door signals.
test_cases.expected_result: DoorFL = 1 while other door signals remain unchanged

test_cases.test_objective: Verify DoorFL is transmitted correctly while the vehicle is moving.
